findings.title: UNC2814 GRIDTIDE: Chinese espionage campaign abusing Google Sheets API targets 53 orgs in 42 countries
findings.summary: Google, Mandiant, and partners disrupted a global Chinese espionage campaign by UNC2814 that deployed a novel C-based backdoor called GRIDTIDE, which abuses the Google Sheets API for evasive C2 operations, impacting 53 organizations across 42 countries since at least 2023.

findings.title: CVE-2026-2329: Critical unauth RCE in Grandstream GXP1600 VoIP phones with Metasploit module
findings.summary: Rapid7 discovered a critical unauthenticated stack buffer overflow in Grandstream GXP1600 series VoIP phones allowing remote code execution with root privileges via the web API, with a Metasploit exploit module publicly available and firmware 1.0.7.81 patching the issue.

findings.title: Malicious npm package ambar-src reaches 50K downloads deploying open-source malware
findings.summary: Tenable Research discovered the malicious npm package ambar-src which reached 50,000 downloads before removal, exploiting preinstall script hooks to deploy OS-specific open-source malware payloads via typosquatting of the popular ember-source package.

findings.title: Lazarus Group now collaborating with Medusa ransomware operators
findings.summary: Symantec/Broadcom reports the North Korean Lazarus Group has begun working with Medusa ransomware operators, marking a significant expansion of the state-sponsored group into ransomware-as-a-service partnerships.

findings.title: CISA warns RESURGE malware can remain dormant on Ivanti devices
findings.summary: CISA issued a new advisory warning that RESURGE malware variants can persist dormant on Ivanti Connect Secure devices even after patching CVE-2025-0282, recommending organizations perform factory resets and forensic analysis.

findings.title: CVE-2025-15467: Critical OpenSSL vulnerability affecting multiple Fortinet products
findings.summary: Fortinet published a critical-severity advisory for CVE-2025-15467, an OpenSSL vulnerability involving maliciously crafted AEAD parameters in CMS AuthEnvelopedData messages affecting FortiAP, FortiClientWindows, and FortiNAC-F products.

noted.summary: Medium-severity HTTP request smuggling vulnerability in FortiOS allowing an unauthenticated attacker to perform request smuggling attacks.
Mozilla released security advisories MFSA 2026-13 through 2026-17 on February 24 addressing multiple vulnerabilities in Firefox 148, Firefox ESR 140.8/115.33, and Thunderbird 148/140.8.
JVN#80500630 discloses an untrusted data deserialization vulnerability in the IM-LogicDesigner module of intra-mart Accel Platform.
JVNVU#96854657 discloses an out-of-bounds write vulnerability in the Fujitsu BIOS driver for Windows.
Kaspersky published analysis of Arkanix Stealer, a C++ and Python MaaS information stealer active for several months with a referral program for partners.
